impact: This lets the daemon resume meaningful progress by stopping the repeated missing-key validator attempt, adding a daemon-only diagnostic task first, and constraining the next domain retry to inspect or minimally replace the committed fixture shape before writing tests.
summary: Replan the blocked DevHub draft-action preview retry behind fixture-shape diagnostics.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 5 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
